title: Desalinate Water With Oasis Foam
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
This was suggested to me by a friend and is really a replication of work done by MIT on flash boiling water using carbon foam and exfoliated graphite
